question: Find the name and age of the director who is in charge of the most programs?
sql: SELECT d.Name, d.Age FROM director d JOIN program p ON d.Director_ID = p.Director_ID GROUP BY d.Director_ID ORDER BY COUNT(p.Program_ID) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找拥有最多节目的导演信息

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求找到负责最多节目的导演的姓名和年龄，SQL反向翻译描述正确地通过连接director和program表，按导演ID分组统计节目数量，并按数量降序排序取第一条记录实现该意图。
